summary: Iteration 7: Tested new Catálogo de Donatarias Autorizadas feature. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: catalog page loads with 134 donatarias, search/filters work, detail dialog shows RFC/giro/estado/estatus/vinculados, link/unlink functionality works, CSV import dialog present.

issues: Minor: Recharts console warning about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly (inherited from previous iterations)

passed_tests: GET /api/catalogo/donatarias returns paginated list with 134 items
GET /api/catalogo/donatarias?giro=ecologica returns only ecological orgs (13 results)
GET /api/catalogo/donatarias?estado=Nuevo+León returns entries from that state
POST /api/catalogo/donatarias/{catalogo_id}/vincular links donor to catalog entry
Sidebar shows 'Catálogo SAT' link with BookOpen icon
Catálogo page loads with table of 134 donatarias
Giro filter dropdown works (9 giros available)
Estado filter dropdown works (18 Mexican states)
Detail dialog shows RFC, Giro, Estado, Estatus SAT fields
Detail dialog shows 'Donantes Vinculados' section with Vincular button
Vincular button opens link donante dialog with dropdown
Importar CSV button opens import dialog with format instructions
seed_data_creation: Catalog auto-seeds 134 donatarias on first GET request. Created TEST_ prefixed donantes during linking tests (cleaned up after).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 tested the new Catálogo de Donatarias Autorizadas feature. The catalog contains 134 Mexican authorized charities with 9 giros (asistencial, becas, cultural, derechos_humanos, desarrollo_social, ecologica, educativa, investigacion, salud), 3 estatus (autorizada, revocada, en_proceso), and 18 Mexican states. The catalog auto-seeds on first GET request. Linking donors to catalog entries requires authentication. All previous features continue to work.

mocked_apis.CFDI_PAC_Integration: CFDI timbrado (stamping) is MOCKED - returns simulated UUID
mocked_apis.Email_Notifications: Email notifications MOCKED - RESEND_API_KEY not configured
